entry.title: Re: PO header field 'Your Reference EKKO-IHREZ' get chang...
entry.content:
Hi Jörg, How did the fix with created on helped you?

Every goods receipt for one item seems to trigger again an entry in the table. So you can have lot's of entries.

entry.title: Testing of Developer Extensibility in S4hana Public Cloud
entry.content:
We are into 3SL landscape of S4hana Public Cloud instance. We do have Key user extensibility(DEV-XYZ tenant) along with Developer extensibility(DEV-ABC tenant). 

We have created Class->Custom Entity-> Service Definition->Published Service Binding in DEV-ABC tenant using ADT. Now since we are into cross client , how do we test this in DEV-XYZ ???? bcz DEV-ABC doesnt have data and it only meant for ABAP tenant. 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Extensibility

entry.title: want to create an uploader for new generated classification for customer and assign characteristics
entry.content:
TYPES: BEGIN OF ty_input,
         customer             TYPE kunnr,
         region_reporting     TYPE Char30,
         subregion            TYPE Char30,
         regional_sales_mgr   TYPE Char30,
         country_manager      TYPE Char30,
         lv_objtab            TYPE BAPI1003_KEY-OBJECTTABLE,
         lv_class     TYPE BAPI1003_KEY-CLASSNUM,
         lv_type      TYPE BAPI1003_KEY-CLASSTYPE,
       END OF ty_input.

LOOP AT lt_input INTO ls_input.

    CLEAR: lt_char, gt_values_num, gt_values_curr.

   CALL FUNCTION 'CONVERSION_EXIT_ALPHA_INPUT'
  EXPORTING
    input  = ls_input-customer
  IMPORTING
    output = lv_objkey.
    " pad customer number if needed: lv_objkey = |{ ls_input-customer ALPHA = IN }|

    " Fill classification values
    APPEND VALUE #( charact = 'REGION_REPORTING'     value_char = ls_input-region_reporting )     TO lt_char.
    APPEND VALUE #( charact = 'SUBREGION'            value_char = ls_input-subregion )            TO lt_char.
    APPEND VALUE #( charact = 'REGIONAL_SALES_MGR'   value_char = ls_input-regional_sales_mgr )   TO lt_char.
    APPEND VALUE #( charact = 'COUNTRY_MANAGER'      value_char = ls_input-country_manager )      TO lt_char.




 CALL FUNCTION 'BAPI_OBJCL_CHANGE'
   EXPORTING
    OBJECTKEY                =  lv_objkey
     objecttable              = ls_input-lv_objtab
     classnum                 = ls_input-lv_class
     classtype                = ls_input-lv_type

   TABLES
     allocvaluesnumnew        = gt_values_num
     allocvaluescharnew       = lt_char
   allocvaluescurrnew       =   gt_values_curr
     return                   = lt_return
           .
IF lt_return IS INITIAL.
  WRITE: / 'No return messages from BAPI for customer:', lv_objkey.
ENDIF.

clear lt_char.

   CALL FUNCTION 'BAPI_TRANSACTION_COMMIT'
              EXPORTING
                WAIT          = 'X'.
*              IMPORTING
*                RETURN        =
                       .


CLEAR ls_result.
ls_result-customer = ls_input-customer.

READ TABLE lt_return INTO ls_return WITH KEY type = 'E'.
IF sy-subrc <> 0.
  READ TABLE lt_return INTO ls_return WITH KEY type = 'A'.
ENDIF.
IF sy-subrc = 0.
  ls_result-message = ls_return-message.
  ls_result-msg_type = ls_return-type.
ELSE.
  ls_result-message = 'Classification updated successfully.'.
  ls_result-msg_type = 'S'.
ENDIF.

APPEND ls_result TO lt_result.

ENDLOOP.

my internal table is populating correctly which I'm passing through BAPI but it is not reflecting for that customer in T code BP. What might be the issue.

Thank you.

entry.title: Moving Commerce Cloud code repository
entry.content:
There is an active exploration of moving a Commerce Cloud code repository from Azure DevOps to Bitbucket. A limitation has been identified in the Cloud Portal—only a single repository can be used across all Commerce environments.

Guidance is needed on how to navigate this limitation within SAP. Ideally, the goal is to update the repository destination for a lower environment first, without affecting the production environment, but this does not currently appear feasible. Shifting repositories between locations and environments seems to be a common need.

Looking for resources that can provide support with this challenge or share how others have approached similar situations?

entry.title: Re: Natively ABAP Cloud (Clean Core) Add-ons in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content: @MustafaBensan thank you for your comment. Yes, partners can use the Multi-Off Delivery approach to provide extensions to our customers. However, it is important to note that the Multi-Off Delivery approach is not based on add-on technology in general or the Add-On Assembly Kit as a Service in particular. We anticipate that this scalable solution will provide both customers and partners with an enhanced experience through automation, utilizing the SAP Store for consumption. Additionally, we expect this will help expand the portfolio of partner solutions.

entry.title: Job Classification Change - Synch to Position
entry.content:
Hello -- we have encountered situations where updating a job classification does synch to the position(s).  This behavior seemed to have started after one of the recent upgrades.  So the question to the community is: why are the positions are not syncing when job classifications are updated?  

I read in another community post that there is no standard trigger from Job Classification to Position.  

If you've had this same issue, what solution did you come up with so that job classification would syncing to the position information?

Thank you -- BK

entry.title: Re: RAP UI annotations: Line chart in column of object pa...
entry.content: Change the chart type and try once.

entry.title: Re: Statutory Reporting France Italy

Thank you in advanced

entry.title: Re: SAP Business Data Cloud - FAQs
entry.content:
Hello @jeetendrakapase. I have additional questions regarding the BW part: 

Is it possible to lift BW 7.5. on HANA to the Private Cloud including SEM-BCS or BW/4HANA including BCS4HANA (Business Consolidation Add-On)?

If yes, would it be possible to lift BW 7.5. on HANA including SEM-BCS to the private cloud and later convert it to BW/4HANA including BCS4HANA? 

BR, Daniel

entry.title: Re: Add color to Fiori elements app using CDS annotations in My inbox
entry.content: using Datapoint annotation we can give color to any field in Fiori

entry.title: Re: PO header field 'Your Reference EKKO-IHREZ' get chang...
entry.content: @BenjaminB - Hi Benjamin, I've to admit, that we didn't run the program since the OSS-Note is implemented. The program is only running, when the S4 or GTS have been down. Do you run it daily? BR Jörg

entry.title: Logic to update header information in JPB Bank positive pay file for manual checks
entry.content:
Hello All,

Good day!

I need help regarding header information update in positive pay file for JPM Bank for manual check which is using payment medium program.

Recently we got a requirement from business to update header information for positive pay file due to JPM Bank is rejecting the file. Earlier Bank used to accept the payment file without header information but due to change in the process it is required now.

When I check reference payment files which are having header information those are picking from REGUT table but REGUT table is not updating for manual check. Hence I need your inputs on how can we fetch the data required for positive pay file header information.

 

Kindly support.

 

Best Regards,

Noor

entry.title: Re: Smq2 Post goods issue not allowed User Status SD, obj...
entry.content:
VB objects are Sales document item (check table TBO00)

As this is a custom user status profile, check its defintion for sales order item, especially on relations between user statises and operations (operation allowed for a status, status set by operation) but also for any custom development (e.g. SD user exits) that would force the status.

entry.title: Re: Statutory Reporting France Italy
entry.content:
Dear user,

These reports can be generated in S/4HANA via the Advanced Compliance Reporting (ACR) framework or classic financial reports, depending on localization settings and system configuration.

For Italy :

1. Libro Giornale and Libro Mastro are part of the Italy localization (FI-LOC-IT).

2. You can generate them using transaction RFKABL00 and RFKSLD00, or through:

    • App: "Run Compliance Reports" (Advanced Compliance Reporting)
    • Report: RFLGL_MIGRATION (if migrating or formatting for legal submission)

SAP also provides country-specific programs like:

  • RFLITJ10 – Libro Giornale (Italy)
  • RFLITM10 – Libro Mastro (Italy)

 

For France :

1. For Livre Journal Détail and Grand Livre, part of France localization (FI-LOC-FR):

  • SAP uses report RFJGLFR0 for Grand Livre.
  • Livre Journal can be created using RFBELJ10 (journal entries detail report).
  • Both may also be integrated in the Advanced Compliance Reporting (ACR) framework.

2. Check the "Run Compliance Reports" app and look for:

  • France: Detailed Journal (FR_JDETAIL)
  • France: General Ledger (FR_GLEDGER)

 

I hope this will help you answer your question.

Best regards,

Jeremy

entry.title: Re: WHY IS MY BOOK PAGE TEXT CHANGING WHEN THE BOOK IS EX...
entry.content: And let's also state some Best Practices, such as: (a.) never use manual formatting if you can help it, (b.) always set up the appropriate text styles that you need and then select them from the Paragraph Style drop-down list in the HTML Editor as you enter text, (c.) remember to set up equivalent Text Styles for your printed documents, named the same so that they will map correctly during document generation, (d.) try to keep your Text Styles consistent from one workarea to the next, and (e.) you do not need a Development workarea versus a Production workarea, and do not let IT/BASIS or a corporate policy wonk bully you into doing that just because "that's how we manage our ERP environments." Simply have one workarea where you do all your development and publishing, and keep all your draft stuff Unpublished in a folder within that workarea tree. When you're ready to Publish it, move it into a Published portion of the workarea tree. You can control what is Published and what is Unpublished by using the SEN Manager interface, selecting the appropriate folder in the tree, and choose More > Publish All Objects or More > Unpublish All Objects. You can do this from Producer using the Server Bulk Actions > Change Workflow for All Objects menu, but that takes a lot longer if you have many objects.

entry.title: Re: PO header field 'Your Reference EKKO-IHREZ' get chang...
entry.content:
After GTS was done, we run normally /SAPSLL/DS_I_MM0A_R3 .

The other report is periodically used to close documents on gts side, when they are completed - or to process follow on functions after a release.

entry.title: Re: Enabling your workforce for the future with the new integrated learning experience
entry.content:
@Srijanas Heidi mentioned if there is a data refresh there is a known issue to search. If this also applies to you please open a ticket so we can look into it for your specific instance.  

 @heidirobinson thank you for sharing your ticket information! We hope to be able to give you a resolution soon. 

Also just a general note, we are doing a staggered rollout for the near real time search (search will now see updates in up to 30 minutes instead of the up to 8 hours in production and up to 72 hours in preview). This data change will resolve the issue we previously had about instance refreshes so moving forward instance refreshes should not impact search. You can favorite this KBA to see when it will get rolled out to your Data Center https://me.sap.com/notes/3582342

entry.title: Re: Statutory Reporting France Italy
entry.content: Hey thank you for your fast respond. Could you please explain the path how to activate for example FI-LOC-IT ?

entry.title: Re: BAPI_CONTRACT_CHANGE is not updating the Net Price in...
entry.content: Please check if the note 3126346 - Netprice is not changed for an outline agreement item via BAPI is relevant for your system.

entry.title: Second SAP Stammtisch in Cape Town!
entry.content:
After launching the first successful event at the Woodstock Brewery, I’m happy to announce the second SAP Stammtisch in Cape Town! This event format in South Africa is all about the latest SAP news and innovations—a space to connect, share, and learn.

What’s It About?

This is a casual, community-driven meetup where everyone is welcome—SAP users, developers, consultants, architects, business analysts, and project managers. If you work with SAP in any way, join us, bring a friend, and share your thoughts!

Stammtisch? What’s That?

For those unfamiliar, “Stammtisch” is a German term for a regular, informal gathering—a friendly get-together rather than a structured meeting. 

Where?

We’re hosting the event in the Dunes Beach Restaurant & Bar in Hout Bay. It offers exactly what we believe a great networking event needs: a relaxed atmosphere in a spectacular setting. Nestled right on the beach at the mouth of the Hout Bay River, Dunes blends coastal charm with stunning views of Chapman's Peak, the Sentinel, and the Atlantic Ocean — the perfect backdrop for open conversations, new ideas, and fresh connections.

Who Can Join?

Absolutely everyone!

Who is behind the SAP Stammtisch?

Usually, the SAP Stammtisch is driven by the community itself, but it always needs a trigger to get started. That’s why Robert Peter and Ute Buerkle taking the first step to bring SAP professionals together, spark conversations, and help the SAP community in Cape Town flourish. 

Shortly about Robert: After launching my own business around SAP Customer Experience Consulting and Development, redcup code in Cape Town, I realised that while SAP communities thrive worldwide, there hasn’t been an SAP Stammtisch in South Africa—until now!

Shortly about Ute: She has been a valued expert in the SAP ecosystem for over 30 years. With deep knowledge and experience across numerous SAP projects, she has contributed significantly to the community and inspired many professionals. Now retired, she remains passionate about sharing her knowledge and helping the SAP community thrive.

Let’s build this network together—see you on June 17h at Dunes Beach Restaurant & Bar!

Looking forward to meeting you there! 🙂

entry.title: Re: Service Procurement is only allowed for valuated good...
entry.content:
Hello Mona,
the error occurs when a supplier invoice is created but the requirements for service procurement are not met. Essentially, the issue is that certain provisions relating to goods receipts and their account assignment must be met for the supply of services.

- Make sure that the goods receipt for the service item has been correctly posted and checked in the system before you create the invoice.

- Check the posting account assignment and ensure that it matches the goods receipt check and the requirements of the SES.

- Check that all relevant fields such as work item ID and service performer are correctly filled in the SES and purchase order. This information may be missing and must be amended.

- Check the items in the purchase order and make sure that all required fields are filled in correctly, especially for the service item.

If you have checked everything and the error still exists, can you provide some screenshots ?

Best regards

Dennis

entry.title: Re: Enabling your workforce for the future with the new integrated learning experience
entry.content: I don't think it is a data refresh issue because we are not able to search for anything. The search either comes blank or it says not able to load data.

entry.title: Re: Enabling your workforce for the future with the new integrated learning experience
entry.content: @Srijan please open up a ticket so we can look into the issue further

entry.title: CSB: custom font
entry.content:
Hello,

We would like to upload a new custom font.

However we have realized it does not update the following settings (especially text components):

Pages> Home > default > text components
Pages> Content > default > text components
Pages> Category > default > category page > text components
Pages> Landing > default > text components & Data capture forms

Updating all of them in Test and Prod will be time consuming.

How can we update them all in one shot?

Using exported xml files from CSB helps but too many text components remain unchanged.

Is there a script available to perform such change?

Kind Regards,

Abdelrani

SAP SuccessFactors Recruiting

entry.title: QM Notification number skip during creation in SAP Public cloud
entry.content:
When QM notifications are created and viewed in QM notification worklist, we can observe a skip in number range in SAP Public cloud.

Why is this happening and how to prevent ?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: QM Notification number skip during creation in SAP Pu...
entry.content:
Standard system behavior.

Number range object QMEL_NR is buffered.

When the system buffers a number range object, it does not update numbers individually in the database. It reserves a preset group of numbers requested and makes these numbers available

Buffering the number range object has a positive effect on performance.

SAP Note 62077 provides a detailed explanation for this symptom.

 

In S/4HANA Cloud it is not possible to disable buffering for the number range object QMEL_NR

entry.title: Re: Natively ABAP Cloud (Clean Core) Add-ons in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
@Marco_Valencia, 

I fully agree that the Scalable Delivery option offers a significantly improved experience for both partners and customers—it’s the ideal path forward.  However, to accelerate the growth of partner solutions delivered through this model, I encourage SAP to consider more flexible commercial terms for the required Partner Cloud test, demo, and development (TDD) landscape for SAP S/4HANA Cloud, public edition (SKU #8017424).  While the per-user pricing is perfectly reasonable, the current requirement to purchase in minimum blocks of 100 users creates a high barrier to entry for smaller partners who wish to innovate with packaged ABAP Cloud add-ons.

entry.title: Re: HCM Brasil: Crédito do Trabalhador - eConsignado

Vendo o layout não entendemos se será necessário apenas informar a rubrica do eConsignado com a natureza correta no 1200 e estará tudo ok ou se precisaremos informar em mais algum local.

Obrigado

entry.title: Re: Trigger Conditional Emails in Recruiting
entry.content:
The standard email trigger can only be activated based on the talent status pipeline and the triggers available under recruiting email triggers. The functionality you’re expecting can be achieved through a custom API integration using CPI. With this approach, you can create custom email templates and trigger them based on your specific scenarios.

Thanks,
Sanjeet

entry.title: Re: OLE2 objects: Select several ranges at once
entry.content: this is only an example, the problem is not writting the data, the problem is locking the cells, the second part of the code. when i try to select several ranges at once

entry.title: Re: Comments box visible in recruitment dashboard
entry.content:
That is not feasible at the moment. The recruiting dashboard can only display a few standard fields, such as operator roles and organizational data like Division, Business Unit, Department, Location, and Cost Center.

Thanks,
Sanjeet

entry.title: Re: Consolidation: link group transaction types / transaction type
entry.content: I am also facing same issue. any solution on this?

entry.title: Re: Sneak Peek in to SAP Analytics Cloud release for Q2 2025
entry.content:
Hi Xavier,

Existing SAC tenant can be added to SAP Business Data Cloud formation. I believe SAP Datasphere tenant needs the provisioned specically for SAP Business Data Cloud but best is to check SAP Business Data Cloud documentation on provisioning.
https://help.sap.com/docs/business-data-cloud/administering-sap-business-data-cloud/provision-and-configure-sap-business-data-cloud-in-sap-for-me.
Joule Analytical Insights support for standalone SAP Datasphere tenant is planned in Q3.
Thanks,
François

entry.title: Re: Unassigned test cases in Cloud ALM test execution
entry.content:
Hello Sebastián,

somehow it works as designed :-).

But the real reason is the evolution of the Cloud ALM Test Suite. At the beginning there were only stand-alone Test Cases. Every stand-alone Test Case offered only one eternal result instance. This means that when you execute the Test Case two times, the system will consider this a 4-eyes execution of the same Test Case and the reporting will always show only one overall status, having the status of this overall result (success, failure) the worst case combination of all executions. If you need a second run of the Test Case for a regression test later on, then you have to copy the Test Case, thus creating a new stand-alone Test Case as a clone of the old one.

This was a little bit ugly, people used external tools and some upload facility for additional test runs.

Therefore, SAP kindly introduced Test Plans. Now every Test Case can be assigned to 1 .. n Test Plans, and every Test Execution inside a Test Plan will be an own instance. This means that for every new test run you can copy the Test Plan, or create a new one, and the Test Case will offer new evaluations: during the run of TestPlan01 the Test Case was evaluated to Success, during a later run of TestPlan02 the same Test Case may evaluate to Failure. In the reporting you will see these differences.

Now to your problem: decisive is the "Test Plan Status" selection, with which you can choose between old stile (stand-alone Test Case) and new stile (Test Case inside a Test Plan). You problem might be that you wish to force the new stile. When you don't touch the "Standard" view, it selects only the new stile by filtering for Test Plans "in Testing".

But sure, testers can be difficult to steer, and according to Murphy's Law every mistake will find someone who will do it, so I can imagine some sort of governance functionality, which forces the desired Test Plan Status (or prohibits the selection of "(None)").

You may consider to create an improvement request here: https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/campaign/3501

entry.title: Re: OLE2 objects: Select several ranges at once
entry.content: hello, As far as I know (correct me if I'm wrong) abap2xls cannot use files with embedded macros. abap2xlsx does not support embedding or preserving VBA modules (macros), because VBA code is stored in a binary format, not in the Open XML structure.

entry.title: Issue in restricted measure calculation.
entry.content:
Hi Experts

I have account based model.

I have to create one input form of cost center budget. That user should enter value in Budget of 2025.

At the same table Actual of 2023  and Forecast 2024 also display

It include actual of 2 years back, budget should be current year and forecast of previous year. I am created restricted measures in story level but issue is that it shows same value of year in every month. for ex if I have Jan 2025 actual value 50 then its show same for all month of 2025 in actual.

I tried model level calculation through restrict but it shows error, like all cells shows diagonal.

 

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: New READ TABLE Syntax Results in SY-SUBRC = 4 – Why Is It Not Recognized?
entry.content: Hi Sandra, Thanks for the quick reply according to my understanding the sy-subrc should set to 0 if the record is retrieved or is it only that the exception CX_SY_ITAB_LINE_NOT_FOUND will be raised alone if the data is not found by the expression. i referred to the below blog : https://abapskill.com/abap/read-statement-in-sap-abap-7-4/

entry.title: Re: Add Value Help with SAP Build Actions (free project)
entry.content:
Thnks Dan, 🙂 

do you think i could instead of using SAP Build Apps i could use UI5?

entry.title: SAP Fiori development newsletter May 2025 (issue #34)
entry.content:
SAP Sapphire is coming, so you should expect lots of announcements about how AI solves complex business problems. AI also plays a major role in application development and simplifying the user experience. This issue has information about some product innovations that will make your life as a developer easier.

For ongoing updates, I encourage you to join our monthly SAP Fiori development roundtable. You can meet online with fellow developers and the SAP engineers who build our professional development tools. Register online or email me for an invitation. Our next meeting is Wednesday, May 14, 2025. 

If you prefer to receive this in your inbox, please subscribe to the SAP Fiori development newsletter.

Development News

Sapphire preview blog post

SAP Sapphire and the ASUG Annual Conference are a great way to see the art of the possible, get inspired, and take away some concrete next steps on how to move your organization forward. This post contains sessions on AI, UX, moving to SAP S/4HANA Cloud, and personal development, including organizational change management.
https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/ux-ai-sap-s-4hana-transformation-sessions-at-sap-sapphire-and-asug-annual/ba-p/14068806

Announcement: removal of Belize theme of SAP Fiori

Know about the removal of the Belize theme of SAP Fiori and how to handle custom themes based on Belize.
https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/announcement-removal-of-belize-theme-of-sap-fiori/ba-p/14061924

UI5 linter just got smarter: Autofix is here!

UI5 linter is the tool of choice to check your UI5 project for using best practices and replacement of deprecated UI5 APIs. With UI5 linter v1.12.0, we are happy to announce the initial version of an autofix feature: Use the "--fix" argument to let UI5 linter apply fixes to your code automatically. https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/migrate-your-code-with-ui5-linter-autofix-has-landed/ba-p/14048470

SAPUI5 adoption now reaches all seven continents

SAPUI5 is the foundation of many SAP solutions such SAP S/4HANA. Developers experience modern tools in SAP Build Code and frameworks such as SAP Fiori elements to efficiently develop and extend SAPUI5 applications. The combination of its power and ease of use is what drives its adoption across every continent, including Antarctica.
https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/sapui5-adoption-becoming-more-universal/ba-p/14064364

Simplify SAPUI5 code extensions with the SAP Build Extensibility Wizard

SAP S/4HANA Cloud introduced the new SAP Build Extensibility Wizard, consolidating multiple extension options into one streamlined tool. Launch the wizard directly from a running SAP Fiori app for a simplified extension process. The latest update to the SAP Build Extensibility Wizard introduces the ability to also create an SAPUI5 adaptation project as a User Interface Extension.
https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/simplify-sapui5-code-extensions-with-the-sap-build-extensibility-wizard/ba-p/14087839

Energy supplier badenova transforms work order coordination with SAP Fiori Makers, BTP, and user research insights

SAP customer and German energy supplier badenova embarked on a transformative journey to streamline its work order coordination processes. To better manage the persistent operational challenges around customer requests, its subsidiary badenovaNETZE joined SAP to create a user-centric and future-focused design and solution for a new work order cockpit. They use SAP Fiori elements, SAP BTP, Scenes, and end user insights to get the job done. 
https://news.sap.com/2025/03/badenovanetze-work-order-coordination-sap-fiori-bootcamp/

SAP Fiori tools 2503 update: icons, app Info page, adaptation projects, preview

SAP Fiori tools 2503 release introduces a refreshed icon set, improvements to the Application Info page, a new approach to previewing applications using virtual endpoints, and enhancements for UI adaptation. This post covers these and several other updates.
https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/sap-fiori-tools-2503-update-icons-app-info-page-adaptation-projects-preview/ba-p/14056256

SAP Build Code updates

The latest updates to SAP Build Code include a new high productivity experience for CAP Java projects, the creation of UI applications via our AI copilot Joule, and the development of MDK-based projects utilizing Joule. And much more. Details in the latest summary post. 
https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/product-updates-for-sap-build-code-march-2025-edition/ba-p/14056060

SAP Build has new, simplified pricing and packaging to provide a unified experience for all developers

SAP is introducing a new, unified commercial model for SAP Build that consolidates capabilities for pro-code, low-code, and AI-powered development tools. This makes it easier to build applications and extensions within the SAP ecosystem. 
https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/introducing-the-new-pricing-and-packaging-for-sap-build-a-unified/ba-p/14086382

Events

SAP Fiori Innovation Day dates in 2025

We have the dates for our next SAP Fiori Innovation Day events. 

  • October 17 in Dallas, Texas
  • December 10 in Paris, France

The registration pages will go live during the summer, but you can mark your calendar now.

Back issues from the past year

SAP Fiori development newsletter March 2025 (Issue #33)

SAP Fiori development newsletter January 2025 (issue #32)

SAP Fiori development newsletter November 2024 (issue #31)

SAP Fiori development newsletter September 2024 (issue #30)

SAP Fiori development newsletter July 2024 (issue #29)

SAP FIori development newsletter May 2024 (issue #28)

entry.title: Re: SAP Service and Asset Manager GIS Geocoding
entry.content:
Hi James,

We are using the mapping for work with technical objects, but it isn't an option for a significant portion of the work. We do however have addresses and the address lookup was added several years ago. The only issue there is a lack of any documentation.

entry.title: Re: OLE2 objects: Select several ranges at once
entry.content:
Hello, Sandra.

Yes, I know that it's usually possible to translate almost any code written in VBA to OLE, and that's exactly why I'm asking for your help—because this time I haven't been able to get it to work.


I've recorded macros in Excel to see the VBA code generated when selecting multiple ranges, and it's quite simple—the one I posted above.
But I haven't been able to make it work using OLE.

I created this blog many years ago to help others use OLE2 objects. I'm not an expert, but I've managed to work quite well with these objects for a long time
https://community.sap.com/t5/application-development-and-automation-blog-posts/using-ole2-objects-to-create-an-excel-file/ba-p/13208688

entry.title: Difference between Basic Authentication with clientid and client and OAuth with Client Credentials
entry.content:
Procedures for implementing the two approaches respectively can be seen here:
https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-integration/sap-cloud-integration/basic-authentication-with-clientid-and-clientsecret-for-integration-flow-processing
https://help.sap.com/docs/integration-suite/sap-integration-suite/oauth-with-client-credentials-grant-for-integration-flow-processing

I understand the idea behind each option. However, I don't see how the implementations are different. It seems like service keys generated are the same, and then the adapter configurations in integration flows are also the same. If so, then what is the thing that makes a client be authorized with clientId/clientSecret vs a token?

Thanks

entry.title: Hi-The question is for SAP public cloud change is required in useful life of more than 200 assets
entry.content:
Hi

I got some 200 assets whose useful life needs to be change. The default came in from asset class which needs to be over written. This is for SAP Public cloud and I can see the tools like LSMW/ SCAT which can record and make changes.

is there anyother way where I can make the changes?

 

Thanks

Archit

entry.title: Re: OLE2 objects: Select several ranges at once
Re: Standard Return CBAR - Replacement Material
entry.content:
Hi Annika98

Have you already reviewed the Best Practice Customer Returns (BKP) ?

Please check the Accelerators section for the Test Script - it outlines 3 scenarios for the Goods return and each one has the option to Refund Customer with Replacement Product.

Please let us know if/how the Best Practice does not work for you

Thank you

Jerry

entry.title: Re: Statutory Reporting France Italy
entry.content: Please add a tag for your S/4HANA edition: private/public, premise, cloud?

entry.title: Data getting erased in quickmodel of signavio(using process automation)
entry.content:
Hi Experts,I'm working on automating SAP Signavio QuickModel using SAP Process Automation. I'm capturing the page and defining elements like Organization, Start, End, What, and the "+" button using the Application functionality.

Issue: As soon as I click the "+" button, the value previously entered in the "What" field disappears. I have tried:

Using SendKeys (Tab) after entering the "What" value,

Adding Wait and Wait (element) before and after each step,

Switching recognition criteria to class and id only,

Using SetFocus before entering the value,

And even entering the value after clicking the "+" button — but the value still gets cleared or doesn’t persist.

This behavior is consistent regardless of wait time or method used. The "+" click seems to re-render or refresh the input fields, which causes the data loss.

while Doing it manual it works fine ,but it finds this issue by doing it from process automation

Has anyone faced a similar issue or found a workaround? Is there a way to reliably retain the "What" input or programmatically set it after DOM refresh?

Any guidance would be greatly appreciated!

entry.title: Re: My new UDO does not appear in UDO's list in a UDF wit...
entry.content:
Hi @ANKIT_CHAUHAN, thanks for the reply.

  1. Our version is 10.00.260 SP 2408 64-bit.
  2. I tried restarting and it's still not appearing.

I have other objects and they all appear as options in the Link to UDO list,

entry.title: Error Message FZ 376 : Error in withholding tax calculation S/4HANA
entry.content:
HI Everyone,

We have WHT activated. The WHT will be calculated at the time of Invoice posting. I posted some vendor invoices, the WHT got calculated. Now I want to pay the vendor using F110. When I do my proposal I get this Error.

"Message FZ376 - Error in withholding tax calculation". I am not sure why the program is giving such an error.

I found some SAP Notes related to version 4.6, but I would like to know if there are any correction notes applicable to S/4HANA for this issue.

Could anyone help me with this?

Regards,

FG

entry.title: Re: DDA tool access is rejected
entry.content:
Hi,

Please check this section from the Learning:

https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/explore-sap-cloud-erp/introducing-the-digital-discovery-assessment

You could also try to reach out to SAP Support

  1. For guidance on how to contact the SAP Customer Interaction Center, please refer to SAP Note 560499– Customer Interaction Center: Hotline - Email - Chat
  2. CIC Hotline à 1 800 677 7271, Option 2
  3. Expert Chat à https://launchpad.support.sap.com/#incident/create (For quick resolutions on new issues!)
  4. Schedule an Expert à https://launchpad.support.sap.com/#/sae (For convenient, personalized SAP support on your schedule!)

Thank you

Jerry

entry.title: Re: Packaging Instruction creation and assignment
entry.content: Thank you for your response. However, my query is more focused on ownership and responsibility rather than learning opportunities. We have been handling this for several months now. Since we have a different team, should I reach out to them to discuss business requirements and needs?

entry.title: Re: Need API to Fetch Customer Hierarchies in S/4HANA Pub...
entry.content:
Hi THEMBO1,

 

no idea why you tagged me here. But you cannot work with any CDS view. That's not how it works, it has to be released. Any released CDS view, will also show up in the accelerate hub. The ones mentioned by Jeremy, do not popup there, when I search for them, like the I_BankStatement view for instance.

 

In other words: you need to create an impediment, explaining your use case and try to push it through the influence tool. But there won't be any other APIs, if you have already looked at what is available in the accelerator hub.

 

Best,

Edrilan Berisha

entry.title: Re: OLE2 objects: Select several ranges at once
entry.content: Hmm, haven't tried that yet but you could tweak the demo above, change the template to one with macros and see if smoke comes out. There is an interesting comment in the source: https://github.com/abap2xlsx/abap2xlsx/blob/08c794f3ca9d47d84073222c9fb39b2a9fbf3116/src/zcl_excel_reader_2007.clas.abap#L1902

entry.title: Re: Quality Control Testing Equipment
Re: OLE2 objects: Select several ranges at once
entry.content: I've tried this code but I havent the class zcl_excel_template_data . I have a very old version of SAP. ABAP 701. I got the version of ABAP2xlsx by copying it from another project, and I had to spend a couple of weeks correcting code errors to get it to work in my version. So I don't have the new updates.

entry.title: Re: PO Creation and Approval timing is wrongly showing in...
entry.content:
Hello,

Regarding the time issue, I would like to suggest to check the following information:

  • Review the system's time zone settings to ensure they are correctly configured.
  • Consider adjusting user time zone settings if necessary.
  • Ensure that the flexible workflow for purchase orders is properly configured.
  • Review the settings for automatic, one-step, or multi-step approval processes
  • Be aware that the system intentionally uses different time zones for different purposes. For example: 
    1. The system uses different time zones for document dates to comply with international balance sheet legal requirements 
    2. The document/posting date is based on the local time zone (e.g., German time zone GMT+2).
    3. The creation date is based on the system server time zone, which is typically set to UTC

If everything is correct, I suggest you to come back to us with more screenshot of the problem.

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Handover of test cases to test from one user to anoth...
entry.content:
Hello Rayane,

your requests are valuable, and therefore there exist already improvement requests:

  • Possibility to sort test cases in test plans manually (covers the sequence question)
    • Test plan with test sequence: allow to have the same test cases twice in a sequence 
  • DSAGTest Execution: Tester needs information / notification during E2E tests (the prefix means that the request was formulated together during a meeting of the DSAG AG Testmanagement)
  • Test Packages for CALM / Grouping of Test Cases within Test Plan - it is a long ongoing discussion about the need of the good old Test Packages

Please look at them, and if you share the requests, please vote for them, you may also add comments, especially to the last one 😉

entry.title: Re: OLE2 objects: Select several ranges at once
entry.content: Did you try what I proposed?

entry.content: Same issue with the trial account, did you manage to resolve it?

entry.title: How to monitor Communication Arrangments via Cloud ALM
entry.content:
Hello,

 

Is it possible to monitor Communication Arrangements for disconnection and inactivity aside from Technical Monitoring Cockpit and Captured ABAP Statistics Records from S/4 tenants? For expiring certificates, that can be monitored already from CALM Health Monitoring.

 

Thanks,

entry.title: Add objectives through Continuous Performance Management without access to the Objectives page?
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

We have are using both the Continuous Performance and Objectives functionalities in SAP SuccessFactors. We want employees to manage and add their objectives solely through Continuous Performance, without giving them access to the Objectives page. After some testing, we found that it seems impossible to provide access to add and edit objectives through Continuous Performance without also giving access to the Objectives page.

Has anyone encountered this scenario, and is there a way to achieve this within the current system setup?

There is an option to only use Objective plans. Because with the latest release, it appears we can give access to Continuous Performance Management data without accessing the CPM page itself. This would allow employees to create activities straight from the the objectives plan page, so they can maintain everything within one module. 

Still we prefer the option to only use the CPM page..

entry.title: ‌🇲🇾‌ SAP SuccessFactors Value & Innovation in Practice (VIP) Day 2025
entry.content:
Join us for an exclusive SAP SuccessFactors Community event where you'll get the latest insights into HR and technology trends, explore the newest SAP feature updates, and connect with fellow HR operations and IT administration professionals.

Highlights Include:

  • Statutory updates and e-services for Malaysia presented by SAP Globalization

  • An exciting AI showcase

  • Networking opportunities with HR and IT leaders

Who Should Attend:
HR & IT Leaders, Admin Users, and Business Process Owners for Payroll

Don’t miss this opportunity to stay ahead in the evolving HR tech landscape!

You can find the agenda and list of speakers here.

Registration link

entry.title: Business Round – Edição de Maio
entry.content:
O happy hour mais conectado do ecossistema de inovação está chegando!
Na segunda-feira, dia 12 de maio, a partir das 18h30, o Bagdad Café Curitiba será o palco de mais uma edição do Business Round — um encontro leve, dinâmico e cheio de conexões que impulsionam ideias e negócios.

O que te espera:
Pitchs de negócios
Open mic para divulgar sua iniciativa
Networking com propósito
Apresentação cultural
Troca de experiências e contatos reais

Ingresso social: 1kg de alimento não perecível
R. Padre Anchieta, 262 – Mercês, Curitiba

Garanta sua vaga e venha fazer parte dessa rede de conexões:
https://bit.ly/Business_Round_Maio_2025

Conecte-se com quem empreende, compartilha e transforma!

entry.title: Re: SAP Service and Asset Manager GIS Geocoding
entry.content: Hi Chris, this could be an issue with the shadow tables not been read by this method. Can you check is SAP Note is in your system: https://me.sap.com/notes/3450235

entry.title: Make Application Job Templates available to specific user(s) only? Anno 2025
entry.content:
Related old question is Solved: How to share application job templates to specific... - SAP Community, however that old question dates 2017 and is answered with an accepted solution from 2017.

What is the current state on making an Application Job Templates available to a specific user only? In the year 2025.

In Content Administration, we can not change the author of a (private) Application Job Template, correct? Hence, is the functionality to be achieved by using 'Job Definitions'? A Job Definition can be assigned to a single/specific user(s) only. Do I understand correctly that a Job Definition does not have an effect on the SAP IBP Excel Add-In's 'Application Jobs' section? Such is my understanding, based on the mentioning only of the web-UI Monitor Application Jobs and Planner Workspaces apps in SAP Help > SAP IBP > Job Definitions, where the Excel Add-In is ommited?

entry.title: Re: Intrastat Declaration Job Not Picking Up Entries in S...
entry.content: Does your POI have at least one plant assigned to it? I did have this problem and the assignment of the plant solved it. The business partner is more like a contact person, but does not have an influence on the selection.

entry.title: Re: Can you import decimal values for competency?
entry.content:
Hello, 

 

If you're trying to import overall competency score in a PM form, I believe it should allow rating with decimal value (e.g. 2.0, 3.00). However, it will only accept value that exists in the rating scale associated to the form. You may need to adjust the rating scale used in your PM form.

Thanks,

Michelle

entry.title: Re: Handover of test cases to test from one user to anoth...
entry.content:
Dear Ricardo,

Thank you so much for your response!

What about the 2 below questions:

- How can we handover a certain test case/execution to another?

- Do we only have the possibility to add one tester in a test plan? waht if a had more testers?

Thank you in adnvance!

Kind regards,

Rayane

entry.title: Re: Easy way to access OData services via btp destinations in a python flask app
entry.content:
FYI for anyone reading this in the future, you don't need to concatenate client_id & client_secret and add the basic auth header. Making the authentication request to the destination service via API only requires that you add client_id and client_secret in the form body, as per the help portal documentation.

i.e you can simplify the auth flow to the below snippet. Adding the basic auth header will result in a 401 response.

# Read the environment variables  
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
  env = AppEnv()
  dest_service = env.get_service(name=sDestinationService)

# Request a JWT token to access the destination service
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
  headers = {'content-type': 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded'}
  form = [('client_id', dest_service.credentials["clientid"] ),('client_secret', dest_service.credentials["clientsecret"] ), ('grant_type', 'client_credentials')]
  
  url = dest_service.credentials['url'] +"/oauth/token"
  headers = {
    'Content-Type': 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded'
  }

  response = requests.request("POST", url, headers=headers, data=form)

entry.title: Re: Error when migrating PI/PO interface to Cloud Integration
entry.content: @Prasanthi I am pretty sure SAP will be able to provide us a solution soon. However I am amazed to see how exact same service with XML-JSON converter seems to work for me. Since I am doing migration, some of the services with XML-JSON converter seems to be working for me, while others not.

entry.title: Re: Interviewer added to interview schedule from the recr...
entry.content:
The feature permission granted in the XML is for scheduling interviews. If the recruiter has this feature permission in the XML, the recruiting team will automatically receive the same access to schedule interviews. However, interview assessments are not linked to this feature permission. If you add the recruiting team as interviewers while scheduling the interview, they will automatically gain access to the Interview Central tab to complete the interview feedback. The Talent Intelligence Hub should not have any impact on this.

Thanks,
Sanjeet

entry.title: Re: SAP PRD QUERY
entry.content: Hello, I didn't understand very well. Serial Number vs Product Parts: is it a simple list that you need? Should it "tie" to other serial numbers (of parts)? or product vs model, product vs BOM... While generating a quote... ask the customer.. if it is not in SAP? What do you mean by that? If you want to associate an order with a serial number, you must always know which serial number the order is being placed for (the customer may have several), and even if you have the serial number history for that customer, you will not know which one they are buying for if it is not specified. Or are you referring to serial numbers that have not been registered (old process) and you want to associate them with the history now (at the time of the sale of the parts)?

entry.title: Re: How to delete all glossary entries at once in Process...
entry.content:
Good day Mariane,

Thank you for sharing your inquiry on the SAP Community.  In response to your inquiry, you can delete a category, in which it will remove all dictionary entries in the category at once.
Please note: some categories are default (Organization, Activities, Documents, etc.) and they cannot be removed, therefore you wouldn't be able to do this in bulk.  

Kind regards,

KantriceD

entry.title: Re: How to reverse COP1/COP2 created HU for the Process O...
entry.content: You can use the HUMO transaction to delete the Handling Units. Afterwards you have the option to create new ones.

entry.title: SAC manual import and conenction with Live data
entry.content:
Hello,

I hope this email finds you well.

I am reaching out to seek your advice on the best practices for importing manual data into SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) on a monthly basis and subsequently joining this data with live SAP data connections. Specifically, I have a few questions that I would appreciate your insights on:

  1. Optimal Storage Path for Manual Data:

    • Could you recommend the most suitable storage path for the manual data? For instance, would using Google Drive or another cloud storage service be ideal for this purpose? I am looking for a solution that ensures easy access and integration with SAC.

  2. Best Medium for Automatic Data Integration:

    • What would be the best medium to automatically join the manual data with the live SAP data every month? The structure of the manual data will remain consistent, with only the values changing each month. I am interested in a method that minimizes manual intervention and ensures seamless integration.

  3. Monthly Data Refresh:

    • Both the manual data and the live SAP data will need to be refreshed once a month. Could you provide guidance on the most efficient way to set up this monthly refresh for both data sources within SAC?

Your expertise and suggestions on these matters would be greatly appreciated. Thank you in advance for your assistance.

#SAC #SACSTORY #SAP #SAPANALYTICAL

entry.title: Payment Method couldn't be found during Bank Transfer
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I'm facing a problem when I try to create a bank transfer in the app Make Bank Transfer. What could be the problem? Where can I add the payment methods so that they're going to be visible in this app?

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: Re: Replace all the Non printable special Characters in SAP HANA table
entry.content: This works for me!

entry.title: Is it possible to have a relative selection for currency conversion date and use a date KUT field?
entry.content:
Hello experts, 

for C4C reports with currency there are always the fields "Display Currency - Conversion Date" and "Display Currency". 

For the Conversion Date I can chose between a absolute value and a relative date (today, yesterday etc.) 

Is it possible to use another date field for the conversion date? We created a KUT field with date format for the date, when it was invoiced. This should be date the used for the currency conversion. 

I seems that this is not possible in the Standard. But here the question, just to be sure I dont miss any option... 

Thanks a lot!

Best regards, Deborah

entry.title: Re: How To USE QAC2?
entry.content:
That is very helpful. Thank you for the walk through.

After Some more trial and error it looks like the location in the yellow field was the correct destination location to input and that as you said the location and the material but first be set up as a pair before the material can actually be transferred.

entry.title: WBS Allocation KSW1 and KSW5
entry.content:
I am trying to allocate from WBS to another WBS, But i get an error saying No valid sender cost centers could be found.  In Receiver and Sender i have not selected Cost center. i have selected only WBS

Error Message :


Check the definition of the cycle in the maintenance transaction for CCA: Actual Periodic Reposting. No valid sender cost centers could be found to match your selection.

If you use the sender rules "Posted amounts" or "Posted quantities", check whether records exist in the database for the criteria you entered (cost element, version...)

During indirect activity allocation with the sender rule "posted quantities", you should also note that only the difference between the planned/posted activity allocation and the scheduled activity quantity is allocated. If you entered activity types as sender, you should at this point also check the activity type category. For those quantities posted with an activity type of category 1 (manual entry, manual allocation) no indirect activity allocation is possible.

1. If this is an allocation in the FI/FI-SL area, the problem could also be due to the inheritance logic for FI-SL totals tables, whose "Inheritance of sender based on the receiver" indicator is activated in the "Partner object update" view (T811U-INHERSRC). These are tables that were installed before Release 4.6A.
Use transaction GCA8 to check this, and see the section on:
Inheritance Logic for Allocations

then correct the affected cycle, if required.

entry.title: Re: OLE2 objects: Select several ranges at once
entry.content:
Yes, I had already tried what you mentioned—creating macros in Visual Basic and attempting to translate them to OLE—but it doesn’t work.


*   If I use a single cell or range its working:
*    CALL METHOD OF lo_worksheet 'range' = lo_range
*      EXPORTING
*      #1 = 'A1:B1'.
*    CALL METHOD OF lo_range 'select'.
*    CALL METHOD OF lo_application 'selection' = lo_selection.
*    SET PROPERTY OF lo_selection 'locked' = 1.

*   But if I use several ranges, then its not working:
    CALL METHOD OF lo_worksheet 'range' = lo_range
      EXPORTING
      #1 = 'A1,B1,C1'. "Or 'A1:B1, C2, D3:E4'
    CALL METHOD OF lo_range 'select'.
    CALL METHOD OF lo_application 'selection' = lo_selection.
    SET PROPERTY OF lo_selection 'locked' = 1.

I read the link you shared, but it doesn’t provide a solution either. I could use the UNION method to combine ranges, but that method only takes two arguments , and I would need to call it many times in my scenario. What I’m trying to avoid is making so many calls between SAP and Excel, to reduce the use of those FLUSH functions as much as possible. That’s why I wanted to pass a string with all the ranges separated by commas (,), which works fine in VBA, but doesn’t seem to work correctly in OLE.

EDIT: Union accept a lot of arguments:
expresión. Unión (Arg1, Arg2, Arg3, Arg4, Arg5, Arg6, Arg7, Arg8, Arg9, Arg10, Arg11, Arg12, Arg13, Arg14, Arg15, Arg16, Arg17, Arg18, Arg19, Arg20, Arg21, Arg22, Arg23, Arg24, Arg25, Arg26, Arg27, Arg28, Arg29, Arg30)
https://learn.microsoft.com/es-es/office/vba/api/excel.application.union

But I have huge excel files, dont know if this amount of argument is enough. I'll try.

entry.title: Re: Understanding Cloud Credits and API Call Charges in S...
entry.content:
After facing unexpected API call charges and digging into SAP Integration Suite's pricing model, I decided to put together this summary to help others who might be navigating similar questions.

This guide includes:

  • A breakdown of how SAP counts messages (based on SAP Note 2942344)

  • Real-world integration flows with estimated monthly volumes

  • A cost analysis using the Standard Plan

  • Tips for optimizing message usage to reduce costs

I hope this is helpful for others evaluating or using SAP Integration Suite, especially in public cloud or hybrid landscapes. Feedback and discussion welcome!

SAP Integration Suite: Overview and Pricing Model

1. Integration Suite Overview and Technical Context

This document provides a practical overview of SAP Integration Suite's pricing and usage model, including real-world message volume examples, cost implications, and optimization strategies for minimizing operating costs.

SAP Integration Suite is an enterprise-grade integration platform-as-a-service (iPaaS) that enables seamless connection of applications, data, and processes within and outside organizations. It provides pre-built integration scenarios (iFlows) to accelerate integration tasks.

Key Features:

  • Build integration scenarios with Cloud Integration
  • API management for discovering, governing, and securing APIs
  • Event-driven architecture with Business Events
  • Non-SAP connectivity via Open Connectors
  • Interface and mapping implementation with Integration Advisor
  • Trading Partner Management for B2B integrations
  • OData provisioning for SAP Business Suite data access
  • Migration assessments from SAP Process Orchestration
  • Hybrid integration support for cloud and on-premises
  • Data exchange within data spaces

What is a Message?

A 'message' in SAP Integration Suite refers to data units processed through integration flows (iFlows) or API calls. Licensing and costs are calculated based on message volume and size. Messages are counted in 250 KB increments; larger messages are rounded up.

  • 2 MB message = 9 messages (2048 KB ÷ 250 KB = 8.192 → rounded to 9)
  • Retries and splits count as additional messages
  • All tenants (DEV, QAS, PROD) count individually
  • SAP counts messages in 250 KB increments. If aggregated message size exceeds 250 KB, it is rounded up to the nearest multiple of 250 KB. (Source: SAP Note 2942344 – SAP Integration Suite - Message Metric Definition)
  • Prebuilt SAP-to-SAP iFlows from SAP Business Accelerator Hub are exempt from metered charges if unmodified.

Below is a sample iflow with estimated monthly message count and how it could be optimized.

 

Integration Flow

Example Use Case

Message Behavior

Est. Monthly Volume

Optimized Monthly Volume

Optimization Explanation

OES → SAP Public Cloud

Sales Orders pushed to SAP

1 message per sales order

20,000

20,000

Each sales order is counted as one message; no batching assumed.

PIM → SAP Public Cloud

Product master updates/Catalog Sync

1 per product or batched

15,000

100

Batch product updates daily instead of per product; reduces to ~100/month.

SAP Public Cloud → Cloud ALM

System logs, test execution sync

1 per event/log

600

600

Event-based logs; no batching possible.

Shipping App ↔ SAP

Tracking updates with carriers

1 per update

30,000

30,000

Real-time updates; no batching possible.

SAP ↔ Vendor Portal

PO, ASN, Invoice exchange

1 per document

9,000

9,000

Documents typically not batchable.

SAP → eCommerce Platform

Product Catalog Sync

1 per product sync batch

1,000

50

Daily batch updates; 50/month.

eCommerce → SAP

Sales Order Creation

1 per order

10,000

10,000

Real-time order processing.

eCommerce → SAP

Inventory Check

1 per stock query

100,000

5,000

Hourly batch checks to reduce volume.

SAP → eCommerce Platform

Order Status Update

1 per update/order

5,000

1,000

Daily batched updates; estimated 1,000.

eCommerce ↔ SAP

Customer Info & Credit Check

1 per customer/query

20,000

5,000

Batch registrations/checks; estimated 500.

2. Pricing Models Overview

SAP Integration Suite offers three primary commercial models: Subscription-based, CPEA (Cloud Platform Enterprise Agreement), BTPEA (BTP Enterprise Agreement), and PAYG (Pay-As-You-Go).

Plan Name

Included Messages

Tenants

Use Case

Annual Cost (USD)

Starter

50,000

1

Entry-level; limited iFlows

$18,744

Standard

10,000

1

Full integration capabilities

$57,900

Premium

10 million

4

Enterprise-grade + AI

$318,204

Messages Add-on

10,000 per block

N/A

Additional messages

$75.96 per block

3. Total Cost Analysis Example

So, now when we take optimized monthly volume from sample iflow message count and standard Plan from Commercial pricing model. We would pay $5432.68. You can see detailed breakdown clearly showing the per-block cost calculation

Description

Value

Standard Plan Base Monthly Cost

$4,825.00

Included Messages

10,000

Total Optimized Monthly Message Volume

80,750

Additional Messages (Beyond Included)

70,750

Additional Blocks Required

8

Cost per Additional Block

$75.96

Additional Blocks Cost (8 blocks x $75.96/block)

$607.68

Total Monthly Operational Cost

$5,432.68

4. Cost Optimization Recommendations

  • Batch updates (product catalogs, master data) daily.
  • Replace real-time queries with periodic batch processing.
  • Monitor consumption regularly via SAP for Me and SAP BTP Cockpit.
  • Use delta updates instead of full syncs to reduce message counts.

Sources:

  • SAP Discovery Center: https://discovery-center.cloud.sap/serviceCatalog/integration-suite
  • SAP Integration Suite Pricing: https://www.sap.com/products/technology-platform/integration-suite/pricing.html
  • SAP Note 2942344 – Message Metric Definition: https://me.sap.com/notes/2942344
  • A SAP Note: 2903776 - SAP Integration Suite – Service Plans and Upgrade Paths
  • What Is the Consumption-Based Commercial Model?
  • SAP Integration Suite Pricing

I compiled this based on real-world usage and research — feel free to reuse or improve. Would love to hear how others manage message volumes and optimize costs!

entry.title: How do I make a field from a child entity available as non-default in a list report?
entry.content:
I am in the BTP ABAP Environment working on some RAP annotations. I have a RAP Object that looks like this:

define root view entity ROOT
composition [0..*] of CHILD as _child
{
  key uuid,
...
      _child
}
define view entity CHILD
association to parent ROOT as_root on CHILD.rootuuid = ROOT.uuid
{
  key uuid,
      rootuuid,
      CoolValue,
      _root
}

In the annotations of the ROOT, I know I can add fields from my child like so:

annotate entity ROOT with
{
  @ui: {
    lineItem: [{ position: 10, value: '_child.CoolValue' }],
    selectionField: [{ position: 10, element: '_child.CoolValue' }]
  }
  _child;
}

These annotations work great if I want the field to be displayed by default.

My requirement is to have the field available, but not displayed. So for filter fields, I want to see the field in 'Adapt Filters', and for the list I want to view the field in the view settings' Columns list. But by default they should not be displayed.

If I remove the annotations, the field 'CoolValue' is not available at all (because you lose the reference to the field that is important in the child entity). How can I adjust this implementation to make the field available, but not shown by default?

entry.title: Re: Materials to learn SAP Cloud Indentity Services, IAS,...
entry.content:
Hi @DavitMelkonyan 
We also offer a live session Introduction to Cloud Identity Authentication and Cloud Identity Provisioning
Please also check the Exploring the Fundamentals of SAP System Security  where you find a lesson 
Describing the Identity Authentication Service 

in our SAP Developer Center you can find the tutorial Connect Azure Active Directory to Identity Authentication Service where you can learn how to establish trust between your Identity Authentication service and Azure Active Directory

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: Packaging Instruction creation and assignment
entry.content: There is no fixed responsibility for such activities.  Still I would say, you can complete the process, ask the respective team to validate assuming, the understanding within the internal colleagues are fine.   In another way, you are only reducing their work load and I don't think, they would object for this.

entry.title: Re: WFA on HANA supervisior dimension older configuration...
entry.content:
Hello, I understand that, but example sql above still returned the hierarchy, why is it returning a hierarchy when the SQL doesn't define one and Its the only dimension using manager id column.

Also, I deleted the hierarchy supervisor dimension created a new analysis supervisor dimension added the following simple SQL as a test and ran initial process and sync artifact afterwards successfully.

SELECT DISTINCT
    MANAGER_ID
FROM "[%ODS_DATABASE%]"."EMP_JOB_INFO_T"

Added dimension options( note manually maintained SQL)

Yet, in edit Hierarchies, I still see the manager ids in supervisor dimension bundled in a hierarchy like structure, is this normal behavior ? See image below returned as result of SQL above ( no other manager ID dimensions exist in the system)

Thank you

entry.title: Re: OLE2 objects: Select several ranges at once
entry.content:
Have you considered saving the VBA commands into a VBscript file, and then executing the script on the application server?

As you lay out this issue, you are executing this VBA code on a copy of Excel resident on your SAPGUI host PC. This copy of Excel has the XLSX template installed. Using OLE to call the instance of Excel is low performance, but it gives you great flexibility in the content of the commands, ranges in this case.

I have had great success in writing VBscript commands into a text file, saving it in the working directory defined by SAPGUI, and then executing it on the PC.

Inside the VBscript you can read any number of command line parameters in the WScript.Arguments object. Pass these parameters to the VBscript using the PARAMETER string in cl_gui_frontend_services=>execute.

This is a workaround, but the performance is vastly superior to OLE.

DATA: strcommand TYPE string.

  strcommand = |"{ w_path }{ 'Z_SCRIPT.vbs'(vbs) }"|
            && | "{ p_file }"|
            && | "{ p_tab }"|
            && | "{ w_path }"|.

* Run script on Win32 WorkStation
  CALL METHOD cl_gui_frontend_services=>execute
    EXPORTING
      application            = 'WScript'
      parameter              = strcommand
      synchronous            = 'X'
.

entry.title: Re: WFA on HANA supervisior dimension older configuration...
entry.content: Hello, please see my reply in answers as I couldn't add images in comments. Thank you!
